description:
FeedFlow is a minimalistic RSS Reader available on Android, iOS, macOS, Windows and Linux. Built with Kotlin Multiplatform, Jetpack Compose and SwiftUI.


• Choose big-image cards or a grid layout for your feeds.
• Reorder feeds and categories to match your workflow.
• Customize reader text with line height.
• Enjoy more reliable article loading with smarter feed refreshing.
• Improved reliability when opening web links.
